backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that composes blob storage, authorization, and user approval mixins, and exposes endpoints for approval management, session CRUD (admin-only writes, student-scoped reads), and related business logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (UPI QR code generation, error correction level H, copyable fallback section, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every page, layout, and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'The Rajat's Equation', linking the favicon, and mounting the app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in an ErrorBoundary, a React Query provider, and TanStack Router's RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple animated spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) rendered as a spinning bordered circle.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Bell icon popover component that displays per-student notifications from the local store, supports marking individual or all notifications as read, and shows an unread badge count.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptModal.tsx: A modal dialog component that displays a payment receipt with status banner, payment details (student, course, hours, amount, UPI transaction ID), and an optional access code.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: A styled card component for displaying a statistic with a title, value, icon, optional subtitle, and one of four color themes.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A small badge component that renders a color-coded label for a given status value (pending, approved, rejected, etc.).
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A link button that opens a WhatsApp chat with a pre-encoded message to a fixed phone number, styled with WhatsApp green.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity or an anonymous identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Re-exports attendance-related query hooks and provides a convenience wrapper that converts a principal string to a Principal object before fetching student attendance.
frontend/src/hooks/useCanisterHealth.ts: A hook that periodically pings the ICP canister via getProducts and exposes online/checking/lastChecked state, treating IC0508 errors as the canister being stopped.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useMaterials.ts: Re-exports material query hooks and provides a convenience wrapper that converts a principal string to a Principal object before fetching student materials.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend actor, covering user profiles, approvals, UPI payments, sessions, materials, and attendance CRUD operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessions.ts: Re-exports session query hooks and provides a convenience wrapper that converts a principal string to a Principal object before fetching student sessions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes using a deep-blue and gold palette.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Defines the admin portal layout with a responsive sidebar navigation, canister health indicator, pending payment badge, and logout functionality using TanStack Router and React Query.
frontend/src/layouts/RootLayout.tsx: Root layout component that initializes the local store on mount and renders child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/StudentLayout.tsx: Defines the student portal layout with a responsive sidebar navigation, logged-in user display, notification bell, and logout functionality, redirecting unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Provides localStorage-based auth state management with helpers to store, retrieve, and clear authentication info (role, studentId, principalId) and check if the current user is admin or student.
frontend/src/lib/store.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the app's data models (Course, Student, Payment, Session, Material, Notification) and provides localStorage-backed store helpers with default seed data for courses.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for merging Tailwind CSS class names and formatting currency (INR), dates, and datetimes for the Indian locale.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query, Internet Identity, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AttendanceManag: Admin page for marking and viewing student attendance; fetches approved students and sessions via React Query hooks but notes that backend attendance marking requires a student Principal which is not yet wired up.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Courses.tsx: Admin page for managing courses with add, edit, delete, and toggle-active functionality, using a modal dialog form and the local store for persistence.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying summary stats (students, sessions, materials, payments) and lists of recent students and sessions sourced from the local store and backend payment queries.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentMa: Admin page for assigning and managing study materials per student, allowing selection of an approved student and adding/deleting materials stored in the local store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentSe: Admin page for scheduling and managing class sessions per student, supporting adding/deleting sessions with details like date, time, duration, and meet link.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Materials.tsx: Admin page for creating and listing study materials linked to approved students, persisting data to localStorage and fetching approved students from both the backend canister and local store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Notifications.t: Admin page for composing and sending notifications (broadcast or targeted) to students, with options for type and the ability to delete existing notifications from the local store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Payments.tsx: Admin page for viewing, filtering, approving, and rejecting UPI payment requests fetched from the backend canister, with dialogs for entering unique codes or rejection notes.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Sessions.tsx: Admin page for managing tutoring sessions, allowing admins to view, add, and delete sessions with details like date, time, student, and meet link via a dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx: Admin page for managing student registrations with search/filter functionality and approve, reject, and revoke actions with error handling for backend unavailability.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Public landing page displaying active courses, features, testimonials, and contact info, with navigation links to login/register and WhatsApp contact integration.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page supporting both admin (via Internet Identity) and student (via email + access code) authentication flows, with redirect logic for already-authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Displays a payment failure page with an error icon and links to retry payment or return to the student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Displays a payment success confirmation page, triggers a notification for the most recent pending payment, and shows next-step instructions with links to home or register another course.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Multi-step registration form (form → payment → success) that collects student info, course selection, and UPI transaction ID, then creates student and payment records in the local store.
frontend/src/pages/student/Book.tsx: Student booking page that lets students select a course, session type, and hours, then pay via UPI (with QR code and deep link generation) and submit a payment record.
frontend/src/pages/student/Courses.tsx: Student courses page that displays courses matching the student's enrolled course, showing materials count and a WhatsApp contact button if no courses are found.
frontend/src/pages/student/Dashboard.tsx: Student dashboard showing a welcome banner, stats (total classes, upcoming, materials, completed), upcoming sessions, and recently uploaded materials pulled from localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/student/Materials.tsx: Student-facing page that displays study materials filtered by the logged-in student, grouped by course, with file-type icons and external links to open each material.
frontend/src/pages/student/MyMaterials.t: Alternative student materials page that lists materials assigned to the logged-in student sorted by upload date, showing title, course, description, and a view link.
frontend/src/pages/student/MySessions.ts: Student page that splits sessions into upcoming and past lists, reads attendance status from localStorage, and renders each session with date, time, topic, and attendance badge.
frontend/src/pages/student/Payments.tsx: Student payments page showing a summary of total spent, approved, and pending payments, with a sortable list of payment records and a receipt modal on click.
frontend/src/pages/student/Profile.tsx: Student profile page displaying contact info, enrollment details, account status, and a copyable access code for approved students.
frontend/src/pages/student/Sessions.tsx: Student sessions page that loads and separates sessions into upcoming and past lists, rendering each as a card with date, time, duration, and a meet link for upcoming sessions.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the full client-side route tree using TanStack Router, including public routes, role-protected admin and student layout routes with auth guards, and payment result pages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear parameters via sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom brand colors (navy, gold), CSS variable-based semantic tokens, container settings, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the EduPay Portal's current version, known issues (UPI QR scannability), completed features, and a pending action request to improve the student-side UPI payment QR code.
